Question: New York City has way fewer international arrivals per year than which cities?

Answer:
generation: New York City has fewer international arrivals per year than Tokyo, London, Paris, and Dubai. According to the United Nations World Tourism Organization (UNWTO), in 2019, Tokyo received the highest number of international arrivals, with over 30 million visitors, followed by London with around 20 million, Paris with around 15 million, and Dubai with around 14 million. New York City, on the other hand, received around 12 million international arrivals in 2019.
